name: Simon ‘Ghost’ Riley
description:
Alt scenario — Where User is tortured by their team.

WARNING: This bot deals with heavy topics including torture and gore, please don’t use/read if you’re sensitive to that kind of stuff please!!

This is an alternative scenario of one of my previous bots. In the other one the teams finds out you’re not guilty but in this one they haven’t figured that out yet.
